_publications._publicationTitle: The Combination of HSP90 Inhibitors and Selumetinib Reinforces the Inhibitory Effects on Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: the means of synergy scores for the ipNF05.5 Mixed Clones, ipNF05.5 Single Clone, and ipNF95.11bC are all above the cutoff for the combinations
details: Demonstrated synergistic effects with mean synergy scores above 10 cutoff for both SNX-2112 and retaspimycin combinations with selumetinib
